zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Somerville於大約1340年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾林頓時，她的父親Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath51歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Douglas36歲。她與Sir Lawrence Baird結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1384年在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾享年45歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾。

zh-hans.Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United: 英国苏格兰洛包爾林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Somerville于大约1340年出生在英国苏格兰洛包爾林頓时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath51岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Douglas36岁。她与Sir Lawrence Baird结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1384年在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾享年45岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Somerville was born about 1340, in Linton, Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath, was 51 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Douglas, was 36. She married Sir Lawrence Baird. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1384, in Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Somerville est née environ 1340, à Linton, Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Douglas, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Lawrence Baird. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1384, à Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Somerville um 1340 in Linton, Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath 51 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Douglas 36. Sie hat Sir Lawrence Baird geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1384 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Somerville è nata il circa 1340 nel Linton, Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Douglas, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir Lawrence Baird. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1384, nel Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Somervilleが約1340年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアリントンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwathは51歳，母Lady Elizabeth Douglasは36歳であった。Sir Lawrence Bairdと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1384年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアで45歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Somerville(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르 린턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Douglas(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Sir Lawrence Baird(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1384년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Somerville nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Linton, Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Douglas, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Lawrence Baird. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1384, em Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Somerville родилась около 1340 г. в местности линтон, роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Douglas, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Lawrence Baird. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1384 г. в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Somerville nació aproximadamente 1340, en Linton, Roxburghshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Somerville - Lord of Linton and Carnwath, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Douglas, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir Lawrence Baird. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1384, en Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultada en Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
